title: elaeocarpus spathulatus
intro: Elaeocarpus spathulatus is a plant species belonging to the Elaeocarpaceae family, commonly found in tropical regions of Australia and Southeast Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiviral, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory effects. Its health benefits include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating wounds due to its antimicrobial properties. Elaeocarpus spathulatus can be prepared as an infusion by steeping the leaves in hot water or as a tincture by mixing the plant material with a solvent, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
